---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability, CLI, or analysis dimension
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What limitation or gap are you hitting? State the use case, not the solution.

## Proposed solution

What you want DraftForge to do. If it requires a CLI change, sketch the
argparse shape. If it requires a new module, sketch its public API.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways you tried. Why this proposal is the right one.

## Acceptance criteria

Concrete checks that prove the feature works. Example:

- `make demo` still passes with the change.
- New CLI flag documented in `make help` and README.
- Coverage on the new module is at least 75%.
- New tests pin the public API shape.

## Out of scope

What the proposal deliberately does not do, so reviewers do not push back
on unrelated changes.

## Effort estimate

Your gut estimate of implementation time and lines of code. Include any
upstream research needed (vLLM, SGLang, HuggingFace docs).
